ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., unprofitable, vagabond) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock metrics */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "unprofitable" INTEGER /* Number of unprofitable metrics */,
  "vagabond" INTEGER /* Number of vagabond metrics */,
  "vagrant" INTEGER /* Number of vagrant metrics */,
  "abundance" INTEGER /* Number of abundance metrics */,
  "accrue" INTEGER /* Number of accrue metrics */,
  "is_partial" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is partial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the value was recorded */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "is_partial" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the value is partial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the value was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., junior analyst, senior analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the analyst was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the analyst was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_metrics" (
  "prediction_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction metric */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used in the prediction */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction metric was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., junior analyst, senior analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role permission was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
